title: Toni
writer: Jean Renoir, Jacques Levert, Carl Einstein
actors: Charles Blavette, Celia Montalván, Jenny Hélia
plot: In the 1920s, the Provence is a magnet for immigrants seeking work in the quarries or in agriculture. Many mingle with locals and settle down permanently - like Toni, an Italian who has moved in with Marie, a Frenchwoman. Even a w...
